form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th over 295m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.28) behind Go Larry in a Class 5 on April 2. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.29) at this track in a Class 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance tracking the speed and going on to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Class 5 last start at this track, recording a dazzling 16.86 for the 295m journey. Tough field and appears tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance tracking the speed and going on to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Class 5 last start at this track, recording a dazzling 16.86 for the 295m journey. Tough field and appears tested.

form.formComment: Could manage only fourth last time but caught the eye the start prior when he was an impressive winner after tracking the speed, scoring by 0.7 lengths in a Class 5 at this track and clocking an excellent 16.91 for the 295m trip. Key player.

form.formComment: Won his last 15 in a row including a narrow win last start over 457m at Ascot Park by half a length in a Class 5. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by 1.5 lengths at this track (17.33) beating Gotcha Jasper in a Class 4 on March 26. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.25) at this track in a Class 5, finishing sixth and beaten 6 lengths. Has three successes and three minors from eight starts from box 8. Appeals greatly.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 295m at this track in a handy (16.90), beating Opawa Busy. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Holds top-three claims.
